glosses.ja: むさぼり食う; 食い尽くす

sentences.target: Je dévore ce roman sur le balcon.
sentences.reading: /ʒə devɔʁ sə ʁɔmɑ̃ syʁ lə balkɔ̃/

translations.fr: Je dévore ce roman sur le balcon.
translations.ipa: /ʒə devɔʁ sə ʁɔmɑ̃ syʁ lə balkɔ̃/
translations.en: I'm devouring this novel on the balcony.
translations.es: Estoy devorando esta novela en el balcón.
translations.de: Ich verschlinge diesen Roman auf dem Balkon.
translations.it: Sto divorando questo romanzo sul balcone.
translations.ko: 발코니에서 이 소설을 푹 빠져 읽고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在阳台上狂读这本小说。
translations.yue: 我喺露台度狂睇呢本小說。
translations.ru: Я взахлёб читаю этот роман на балконе.
translations.pt: Estou devorando este romance na varanda.
translations.he: אני קורא את הרומן הזה בשקיקה במרפסת.
translations.tr: Balkonda bu romanı bir solukta okuyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang ngấu nghiến cuốn tiểu thuyết này ngoài ban công.
translations.ar: أنا ألتهم هذه الرواية على الشرفة.
translations.nl: Ik verslind deze roman op het balkon.
translations.uk: Я жадібно читаю цей роман на балконі.
translations.hu: Falom ezt a regényt az erkélyen.
translations.hi: मैं बालकनी में यह उपन्यास बड़े चाव से पढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Καταβροχθίζω αυτό το μυθιστόρημα στο μπαλκόνι.
translations.nb: Jeg sluker denne romanen på balkongen.
translations.id: Aku melahap novel ini di balkon.
translations.sv: Jag slukar den här romanen på balkongen.
translations.da: Jeg sluger denne roman på altanen.
translations.ja: バルコニーでこの小説をむさぼるように読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb 'dévore'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; governs the direct object 'ce roman'.
Demonstrative determiner introducing the noun 'roman'.
Common noun; direct object of 'dévore'.
Preposition introducing the locative phrase 'sur le balcon'.
Definite article determining 'balcon'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Ils dévorent la pizza encore brûlante.

translations.fr: Ils dévorent la pizza encore brûlante.
translations.en: They are devouring the still-hot pizza.
translations.es: Están devorando la pizza todavía caliente.
translations.de: Sie verschlingen die noch heiße Pizza.
translations.it: Stanno divorando la pizza ancora bollente.
translations.ko: 그들은 아직 뜨거운 피자를ゲ걸스럽게 먹고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正狼吞虎咽地吃着还烫的披萨。
translations.yue: 佢哋正狼吞虎嚥咁食緊仲好熱嘅披薩。
translations.pt: Eles estão devorando a pizza ainda quente.
translations.he: הם זוללים את הפיצה שעוד חמה.
translations.vi: Họ đang ngấu nghiến chiếc pizza còn nóng hổi.
translations.ar: إنهم يلتهمون البيتزا التي لا تزال ساخنة.
translations.nl: Ze verorberen de nog hete pizza.
translations.hi: वे अभी भी गरम पिज़्ज़ा चट कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: De sluker den fortsatt varme pizzaen.
translations.id: Mereka melahap pizza yang masih panas.
translations.sv: De slukar den fortfarande heta pizzan.
translations.da: De sluger den stadig varme pizza.
translations.fi: He ovat ahmimassa yhä kuumaa pizzaa.
translations.ja: 彼らはまだ熱いピザをがつがつ食べている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of 'dévorent'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; takes 'la pizza' as direct object.
Definite article determining 'pizza'.
Common noun; direct object of 'dévorent'.
Adverb meaning 'still', modifying the adjective 'brûlante'.
Adjective, feminine singular agreeing with 'pizza'; postnominal description of its state.

translations.es: Deja de devorar las patatas fritas.
translations.de: Hör auf, die Chips zu verschlingen.
translations.zh-Hans: 别再狼吞虎咽地吃薯片了。
translations.yue: 唔好再狼吞虎嚥咁食薯片。
translations.pt: Para de devorar as batatas fritas.
translations.vi: Đừng ngấu nghiến khoai tây lát nữa.
translations.nl: Hou op met het verslinden van de chips.
translations.hi: चिप्स को ऐसे गपागप खाना बंद करो.
translations.ja: ポテトチップスをがっつくのはやめてください。

tokens.explanation: Main verb in the 2nd person singular imperative; issues a command and selects 'de' + infinitive.
Preposition used with 'arrêter de' to introduce the infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'arrête de', denoting the action to be stopped.
Definite article, plural; determines 'chips'.
Invariable plural common noun; direct object of 'dévorer'.

translations.en: The cat is devouring its wet food.
translations.es: El gato devora su comida húmeda.
translations.it: Il gatto divora il suo cibo umido.
translations.ko: 고양이가 습식 사료를 게걸스럽게 먹고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 猫正在狼吞虎咽地吃它的湿粮。
translations.yue: 隻貓正狼吞虎嚥咁食緊佢嘅濕糧。
translations.ru: Кот жадно поедает свой влажный корм.
translations.pt: O gato devora a sua ração úmida.
translations.he: החתול זולל את המזון הרטוב שלו.
translations.vi: Con mèo đang ngấu nghiến thức ăn ướt của nó.
translations.uk: Кіт жадібно поїдає свій вологий корм.
translations.hu: A macska falja a nedves eledelét.
translations.hi: बिल्ली अपना गीला खाना चट कर रही है.
translations.el: Η γάτα καταβροχθίζει την υγρή της τροφή.
translations.ja: 猫がウェットフードをがつがつ食べている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article determining 'chat'.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes 'sa pâtée' as direct object.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular; agrees with the feminine singular noun 'pâtée' and marks possession.
Common noun; direct object of 'dévore'.
